title: 12 Pcs Spherical Glass Bottles with Lid, 8.5 oz Round Glass Potion Bottles Halloween Clear Potion Jars Decorative Bottle for Christmas Halloween Costume Props DIY Crafts
description:
About this item
Premium Package: You will receive a total of 12 pieces of Hyuetrsa spherical glass bottles with cork, the perfect amount to meet your DIY decorative needs. Perfect for every occasion and every season, especially for Halloween and Christmas.
High-Quality Materials: Our potion bottles are made of quality thick glass, crafted with no bubbles, not easy to fade or tear. They're durable and reliable, perfect for long-term use.
Perfectly Sized: Measuring approx. 10 x 8.8 cm/ 3.94 x 3.5 inches, with a capacity of about 250 ml/ 8.5 oz. They're just the right size for you to pour things into it or do DIY crafts.
Multi-Purpose: These glass bottles with cork can be used as perfume bottles, message bottles, or storage accessories. Fill them with dried flower petals, beach sand, essential oils, or any other suitable items to make them even more special.
Ideal Gift: Exquisitely crafted, these small round bottles can be painted and given as thoughtful gifts for your family members, friends, relatives, and more. They're the perfect way to show your excellent taste.
› See more product details
reviews_5s: These were great for our Halloween party. Everyone got to make their own drink with their potion bottles and the silicone stoppers were perfect to help prevent leaks. They were packaged well and no broken pieces. Would definitely order again!
reviews_1s: it’s almost impossible to open and close. not practical
